description: Tracks Drive operations performed via /drive:search, /drive:summarize, /drive:ask, and /drive:organize commands for usage analytics and result caching.

Query.description: The search query, question, or folder path used in the command

Files Found.description: Number of files found or processed by the command

Top Result.description: Title or name of the top/primary result file

File IDs.description: Comma-separated Google Drive file IDs of processed files

Folder Context.description: Folder path or scope context for the operation

Sources Used.description: Which data sources were accessed during the operation

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the operation was performed

notes: Idempotent by Query text (case-insensitive) + same calendar day: update if found, create if not. Activity tracking is optional and only writes when Notion is available. The /drive:organize command logs recommendations but never executes file moves.
